name: Surprise Cheese Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow butter to soften.
2. Blend the softened butter with grated cheese, salt, paprika, and cayenne.
3. Mix in the sifted flour until well combined.
4. Mold a teaspoon of the mixture around each olive, covering it completely.
5. Arrange the stuffed olives on a baking sheet and chill until firm.
6. Bake in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 15 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
Makes 50 puffs.
NOTE: These puffs are easy to serve at parties as they can be made in advance, frozen on a baking sheet to keep their shape, and stored in a plastic bag in the freezer. Bake as needed.
